original_statement: which school has a total of 117 students?
mutated_statement: which institution has a total of 117 students while simultaneously being required to be the sole institution with that total and to be counted among several institutions that do not have 117 students?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Added exclusivity & logical contradiction + Modality/quantifier vagueness + Increased syntactic complexity: "school" → "institution" (generalization) | adds "sole institution with that total" (exclusive constraint) | adds "counted among several institutions that do not have 117 students" (direct logical contradiction) | adds modal "required to be" and vague quantifier "several" and conjunctive phrasing (which school has a total of 117 students? → which institution has a total of 117 students while simultaneously being required to be the sole institution with that total and to be counted among several institutions that do not have 117 students?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从提供的日志中可识别的关键信息：agent 的 "thought" 与 "judge_thought" 都断言 Grace Christian School 唯一有117名学生，并同时说“其它若干机构不为117”，但未指出这两项在语义上互为矛盾（即同一机构不可能既是唯一的117又被计入“不为117”的若干机构）。具体表现：agent 仅基于表格做机械查找并给出唯一匹配（执行层面完成任务），没有提出澄清、拒绝或通过逻辑解释/修正来处理显性矛盾，也没有采取折中或分步执行来合理化矛盾。归类原因：该行为符合“无法意识到指令矛盾”类别中的“形式化执行而非语义澄清”——代理在语义层面未识别或处理互斥要求，直接按可行子集输出答案，未表现出矛盾检测、修正或请求澄清的任何迹象。
